description: Trigger harness CI whenever credential/security hook files change.

userStories.title: Cover credential hooks in harness CI triggers
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I need changes under `.claude/hooks/**` to trigger `ci-harness.yml` so credential guard changes receive the same validation as skill/script changes.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml includes `.claude/hooks/**` in both push.paths and pull_request.paths.
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-16; ci-harness path filters and shellcheck now cover .claude/hooks.

userStories.title: Guard hook CI coverage with an eval probe
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I need a deterministic guard so future path-filter edits cannot silently drop hook coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: evals/probes/harness-ci-hooks-paths.sh fails if `.claude/hooks/**` is absent from either harness CI trigger path filter.
The probe fails if the boot-lint shellcheck command stops covering `.claude/hooks/*.sh`.
The probe passes locally after the workflow change.
evals/RESULTS.md is refreshed and CHANGELOG.md records the fix.
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-16; eval probe harness-ci-hooks-paths guards hook CI coverage.
